name: soul-sample
title: Soul Sample
description: Warm chipmunk-soul flip — dusty vinyl loop, live drums, the sound of a confession on a stoop.
style: soul-sample boom-bap, pitched vintage vocal loop, dusty drums, upright bass, warm and emotional, ~88 BPM, gritty soulful male rap, no autotune

production.mixVibe: warm, analog, vocal up front and intimate

hookGuidance: melodic, sung-rap, lean into the emotional turn
